properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hope be my anthem Lord when the world has fallen quiet You stand beside me Give me a song in the night

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus I need You Every moment I need you Hear now this grace bought heart sing out Your praise forever

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Beauty for ashes You find the weak and contrite heart Shoulder its burdens And carry it into the light

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Remember love Remember mercy Christ before me Christ behind me Your loving kindness Has never failed me Christ before me Christ behind me
